_instructions._1: SIMULATION: Same parameters as single-household config. duration_days: 360 recommended for annual data.
_instructions._2: DEFAULTS: solar_defaults, inverter_defaults, battery_defaults define the unit specs shared across all households. Override per-household in 'overrides' if needed.
_instructions._3: HOUSEHOLD TEMPLATES: Define solar/inverter/battery counts per type+wealth combination. These are the defaults assigned automatically — adjust counts after running tests if a combination is over/under sized.
_instructions._4a: 'auto'   — Set total_households + probability distributions for type and wealth. The system randomly assigns type and wealth to each household following those probabilities. Good for realistic neighborhood simulation.
_instructions._4b: 'manual' — Set exact counts per type+wealth combination. The system generates household ids automatically. Good for controlled experiments.
_instructions._5: OVERRIDES: Customize specific households by id (e.g. 'house_03'). Only specify fields to change — everything else stays from the template. Supported fields: solar_count, inverter_count, battery_count, unit_peak_power_kw, unit_max_output_kw, unit_capacity_kwh.
_instructions._6: IDs are auto-assigned as house_01, house_02, etc. in the order they are generated.

simulation._duration_days_help: 360 = full year. Use 30 for quick tests, 90 for seasonal analysis.
simulation._time_step_minutes_help: 60 = hourly (recommended for neighborhood). Use 15 for more granular data.
simulation._season_help: Cloud coverage patterns: spring, summer, fall, winter.
simulation._random_seed_help: Integer for reproducible results. null = different run each time.

grid._import_cost_help: Cost to import energy in $/kWh (0.0075 = 0.75 cents).
grid._export_revenue_help: Revenue from exporting energy in $/kWh (0.009 = 0.9 cents).
grid._export_limit_help: Maximum power each household can export to grid in kW.

energy_management._strategy_help: Applied to all households. Options: LOAD_PRIORITY, CHARGE_PRIORITY, PRODUCE_PRIORITY.

inverter_defaults._comment: Applied to every inverter unit across all households unless overridden.
inverter_defaults._unit_max_output_help: Max output per inverter unit in kW.
inverter_defaults._avr_days_help: Average days between failures. Uses exponential distribution.

battery_defaults._comment: Applied to every battery unit across all households unless overridden.
battery_defaults._unit_capacity_help: Capacity per battery unit in kWh (13.5 = Tesla Powerwall).
battery_defaults._min_soc_help: Minimum state of charge as decimal (0.05 = 5%).

solar_defaults._comment: Applied to every solar array unit across all households unless overridden.
solar_defaults._unit_peak_help: Peak power per solar array unit in kW.

household_templates._comment: Default system sizing per household_type + wealth_level. Adjust counts after running tests if over/under sized.

neighborhood._mode_help: 'auto' for random distribution, 'manual' for exact counts.

auto._total_help: Total number of households to generate.

type_distribution._comment: Probability per household type. Must sum to 1.0.

wealth_distribution._comment: Probability per wealth level. Must sum to 1.0.

manual._comment: Only active when mode is 'manual'. Define exact counts per type+wealth.

overrides._comment: Override specific fields for specific household ids. Only specify what changes.
